title: Introducing AI Image Scanner for monday.com!
excerpt: We are excited to introduce the latest app in the monday.com marketplace: AI Image Scanner! Transform how you manage images, allowing you to extract various information using AI in seconds. Simply upload or snap a photo,…

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
We are excited to introduce the latest app in the monday.com marketplace: AI Image Scanner! Transform how you manage images, allowing you to extract various information using AI in seconds. Simply upload or snap a photo, and watch as the app intelligently extracts key information into your boards.

Key Features:

AI-Powered Data Extraction: Use AI to quickly and effortlessly extract any detail from images or photos.

Optical Character Recognition (OCR): Automatically extract text from images. Turn images of notes, whiteboards, and documents into structured tasks, saving you time and effort.

Describe Image Contents: Get a text summary of image contents for easy understanding and organization.

Custom Scanning Instructions: Explore unlimited use cases by crafting your own scanning instructions, such as:

  • Content extraction
  • Classification
  • Compliance
  • Object detection
  • Defect detection
  • Explicit content detection
  • Many more

Time-Saving Automation: Reduce manual data entry and focus on what matters most.

Use Cases:

AI Image Scanner addresses the challenge of automatically extracting information from images. Here are some scenarios where it can be invaluable:

Project Management: Quickly extract and organize details from whiteboards, notes, and documents into actionable tasks.

Compliance and Quality Control: Automatically detect defects or compliance issues in product images, ensuring standards are met.

Research and Development: Classify and analyze image data to streamline research processes and development projects.

Creative Teams: Summarize and organize visual content, making it easier to manage creative assets and project briefs.

About Us:

We are Deview Studios, a proud monday.com partner dedicated to enhancing your monday.com experience with innovative solutions!

How to Use:

Users can easily install AI Image Scanner from the monday.com marketplace. After installation, configure a scan integration and start extracting information with a few simple steps:

  1. Upload or snap a photo from your phone’s camera.
  2. The app will automatically extract and populate the relevant details into your monday.com boards.

Dependencies:

AI Image Scanner seamlessly integrates with your existing monday.com account, regardless of your subscription tier, and does not have any dependencies.
